title: Savory Jamaican Pistachio Stir-fry
description: A sour and juicy solo-dinner jamaican dish featuring pistachio paste in a paleo-friendly stir-fry that combines savory spices with tender vegetables.

ingredients.name: bell pepper
ingredients.notes: red or green, cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion and garlic, sautéing until translucent.
Add chicken breast to the pan, season with salt and pepper, and cook for about 5-7 minutes or until fully cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside. Increase the heat to high if needed.
Return the skillet to the stove. Add zucchini and bell peppers, tossing well in the hot oil, and cook for about 3-4 minutes or until they start to soften.
Add pistachio paste and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly to prevent sticking.
Stir-fry the chicken back into the skillet with the vegetables. Cook for another minute or two, until everything is heated through.
Serve hot as a solo-dinner dish.
